services.name: libation
command: if [ ! -f /config/AccountsSettings.json ]; then echo ''; echo '========================================'; echo ' Libation: AccountsSettings.json not found'; echo '========================================'; echo ''; echo 'Libation requires your Audible account credentials to run.'; echo ''; echo 'To set up:'; echo '  1. Install Libation desktop on your computer'; echo '     https://github.com/rmcrackan/Libation/releases/latest'; echo '  2. Open it and add your Audible account'; echo '  3. Copy AccountsSettings.json into the app-data/libation/ directory'; echo '     on your Runtipi server'; echo '  4. Optionally copy Settings.json for custom settings'; echo '  5. Restart this app'; echo ''; echo 'Docs: https://getlibation.com/docs/installation/docker'; echo '========================================'; echo ''; exit 1; fi; echo 'AccountsSettings.json found, starting Libation...'; exec /libation/liberate.sh
